body.raw:
{
    "model": "canopylabs/orpheus-v1-english",
    "voice": "autumn",
    "input": "[Cheerful] vanakkam. I am a language model created by Groq. I am here to help you with any questions you may have. How can I assist you today?",
    "response_format": "wav",
    "speed": 1.0
  }

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/speech \
  -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GROQ_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "canopylabs/orpheus-v1-english",
    "input": "Welcome to Orpheus text-to-speech. [cheerful] This is an example of high-quality English audio generation with vocal directions support.",
    "voice": "austin",
    "response_format": "wav"
  }' \
  --output orpheus-english.wav

response.name: S01-Text to Audio invalid voice
S01-Text to Audio with response format as Mp3

body.raw:
{
    "model": "canopylabs/orpheus-v1-english",
    "voice": "autumn",
    "input": "[Cheerful] vanakkam. I am a language model created by Groq. I am here to help you with any questions you may have. How can I assist you today?",
    "response_format": "mp3",
    "speed": 1.0
  }

response.name: S02- MultiLingual

body.raw:
{
  "model": "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a Senior API Test Automation Architect with strong expertise in Java, Rest Assured, TestNG, Maven, and API schema-driven test generation."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "I — INSTRUCTION
Generate Rest Assured Java code for Swagger Petstore APIs.

MANDATORY RULES:
1) Generate ONLY Java Rest Assured code.
2) Do NOT include explanations, markdown, or extra text.
3) Use TestNG as the test runner.
4) Use meaningful class, method, and variable names.
5) Include imports required for Rest Assured, TestNG, and assertions.
6) Use reusable base URI setup.
7) Cover CRUD operations for Pet resource.
8) Add assertions for status code and important response fields.
9) Keep the code clean, executable, and production-style.
10) Do NOT use placeholder comments.

C — CONTEXT
The code will be used by QA engineers for API automation practice using Swagger Petstore.

P — PERSONA
You are a Senior API Test Automation Architect creating enterprise-style reusable Rest Assured automation code.

O — OUTPUT
Return ONLY executable Java code with:
- One test class
- @BeforeClass setup
- Test methods for createPet, getPetById, updatePet, deletePet
- Request body creation
- Response validation

Rules:
- No markdown fences
- No explanation text
- No assumptions outside Swagger Petstore Pet API
- Use business-readable method names

TARGET API:
Swagger Petstore
Resource: Pet
Operations required:
- Add a new pet
- Find pet by ID
- Update an existing pet
- Delete a pet"
    }
  ]
}

response.name: S03-GenerateAPITestcasesFromSwaggerCode
